reasons: Complex adversarial code-review verification over a git range with final-range semantics requires independent source, AST, and history validation.
The request asks to judge multiple candidate defect claims and confidence levels, not a simple low-risk direct answer.
Fusion can reduce false positives by cross-checking whether behavior was newly introduced versus pre-existing or merely relocated.
decision.panel_brief: Adversarially verify the supplied code-review dossier for inclusive range 89770be^..a7e7734. Apply strict final-range semantics: only concrete defects introduced by the net diff at a7e7734 count; relocated pre-existing behavior does not. Use a >=80 confidence threshold. Evaluate the listed concerns: private-helper dynamic-dispatch loss, text-selection dangling wrapper cleanup, temporary property-forwarder overhead/side effects, coordinator state relocation compatibility, and any inference-supported issue from the facts. Return only concrete introduced bugs with failure scenario and confidence 0-100; otherwise state that no issue survives.
